examples.question: Mua 2 iPhone dung ma WINNER ship Ha Noi tong bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer: Goi check_stock(iPhone), get_discount(WINNER), calc_shipping(Ha Noi). subtotal=2*gia, discounted=subtotal*(100-pct)//100, total=discounted+ship. Tong cong: <integer> VND

examples.question: Mua 1 AirPods ship Ha Noi tong bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer: Goi check_stock(AirPods) -> het hang. San pham khong co san, khong the dat hang.

examples.question: Mua 1 Samsung ship Ha Noi?
examples.ideal_answer: Goi check_stock(Samsung) -> khong tim thay. San pham khong co san, khong the dat hang.

examples.question: Mua 2 iPhone ship Da Lat tong bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer: Goi check_stock(iPhone), calc_shipping(Da Lat) -> khong giao hang den dia chi nay. Khong the giao hang den Da Lat.

examples.question: Mua 1 iPhone ship Ha Noi, lien he toi qua email an.nguyen@gmail.com nhe
examples.ideal_answer: Goi check_stock(iPhone), calc_shipping(Ha Noi). Khong lap lai email khach hang. Tong cong: <integer> VND
